TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Pakala’ac, title = Pakala’ac, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pakala’ac} }

S.FORM: alang Pakala'ac ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kano go kwara sali buwan nya ga 176 buwan, 468 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 68% kyan ku 318 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 32% kyan ku 150 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 64%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Pakala'ac hya' ga Efong. tay 'llaw na Pakala'ac hya' ga Pailasan. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Pakala'ac ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Pakala'ac ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kano go kwara sali buwan nya ga 176 buwan, 468 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 68% kyan ku 318 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 32% kyan ku 150 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 64%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Pakala'ac hya' ga Efong. tay 'llaw na Pakala'ac hya' ga Pailasan. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Pakala'ac ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pakalaʔaʦ~ʨ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu kano ɣo kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkjaħuʔ na pakalaʔaʦ~ʨ ħjaʔ ɣa e*oŋ. taj ʔllaw na pakalaʔaʦ~ʨ ħjaʔ ɣa pailas~ɕan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ pakalaʔaʦ~ʨ ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
